title: rosa woodsii var. glabrata
intro: Rosa woodsii var. glabrata, also known as the smooth rose or glabrous rose, is a plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to western North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Rosa woodsii var. glabrata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other female health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
